description: Lean, production-ready HRMS MVP built with React, Express, Prisma, and PostgreSQL, featuring JWT authentication with refresh tokens, role-based dashboards, Google Workspace integration (Calendar, Meet), and Microsoft Teams chat notifications.

knownRisks.description: Requires corporate Google Cloud Project with OAuth consent verification for all employees.
knownRisks.mitigationPlan: Provide structured instructions for client credential creation and allow staging environment testing.

knownRisks.description: Microsoft Teams incoming webhook configuration requires organizational admin privilege.
knownRisks.mitigationPlan: Provide clear documentation for managers to generate incoming webhook URLs for their channels.
